rows.item: 学習意欲・授業参加度

summary: The aim is that students develop general communicative competence and learn to apply this productively and receptively in authentic spoken interactions. English Conversation is a practical course in which students practice skills to express themselves in a foreign language and negotiate meaning in communicative conversational settings.
aims:
KU English Conversation is a practice-based course aimed at developing conversational skills in English. The course objectives are as follows:
• develop English communication ability, emphasizing speaking and listening skills
• develop an operational understanding of grammar, particularly spoken grammar
• improve English pronunciation skills (both segmental and suprasegmental/prosody)
• activate learned English and improve fluency
• build awareness of the socially appropriate use of language according to context
• develop ability to negotiate meaning in communication
• develop cultural understanding as it relates to English language use
• foster intercultural understanding
• provide students with an English-only intercultural classroom experience
goals: Develop English communication ability, emphasizing speaking and listening skills
Improve English pronunciation skills (both segmental and suprasegmental/prosody)
Build awareness of the socially appropriate use of language according to context
Develop cultural understanding as it relates to English language use

plan.text: Group Speaking 1: A skill you would like to master
Group Speaking 2: An interesting place you've visited
Group Speaking 3: How you start your day
Group Speaking 4: A job you would like to do
Group Speaking 5: A country you would like to visit
Group Speaking 6: A website/app you like
Group Speaking 7: Someone who inspires you
Group Speaking 8: Something you're afraid of
Group Speaking 9: Something you are grateful for
Group Speaking 10: Music you like to listen to
Group Speaking 11: Something you're good at doing
Group Speaking 12: A hobby you have

textbooks: All materials will be provided by the instructor
prereq: Open to first year students. Eikaiwa II is a compulsory course required for graduation.
prep: Students are expected to practice English skills and prepare for all classes. Practice outside of class is essential.

extra.label: 区分1
extra.text: 平成20年度以降入学生／令和６年度以降入学生

extra.label: 区分2
extra.text: 共通教育）初年次科目／国際コミュニケーション科目基軸英語

extra.label: 履修における注意点
extra.text: １年次に必修。１外国語（英語）履修上限年間10単位。卒業にはⅠとⅡ両方が必要。

extra.label: 資格等
extra.text: 教免－省令で定める科目：外国語コミュニケーション

extra.label: この授業で身につける「10+1の能力」
extra.text:
語学に関するリテラシー
表現力
コミュニケーション力

extra.label: 教員の実務経験の有無
